You are a player in a coding contest. 
You will be provided a description of problem and then you should generate the right code to solve that problem.
Just only output code wrapped by ```, such as '```python

The code will be abstracted from your reply. 
You should ensure that the code is complete and runnable without modification, including all necessary imports.

__data__.output:
```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    Len = length(Nums),
    Count = 0,
    solve_helper(Nums, 1, Len, Count).

solve_helper([], _, _, Count) -> Count;
solve_helper([A | Rest], I, Len, Count) ->
    NewCount = check_pairs(A, Rest, I + 1, Len, Count),
    solve_helper(Rest, I + 1, Len, NewCount).

check_pairs(_, [], _, _, Count) -> Count;
check_pairs(A, [B | Rest], J, Len, Count) ->
    AbsA = abs(A),
    AbsB = abs(B),
    MinAB = min(AbsA, AbsB),
    MaxAB = max(AbsA, AbsB),
    Diff = abs(A - B),
    Sum = abs(A + B),
    MinDiffSum = min(Diff, Sum),
    MaxDiffSum = max(Diff, Sum),
    case (MinDiffSum =< MinAB) andalso (MaxDiffSum >= MaxAB) of
        true -> check_pairs(A, Rest, J + 1, Len, Count + 1);
        false -> check_pairs(A, Rest, J + 1, Len, Count)
    end.
```

__data__.output:
```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    solve(Nums, 0, 0).

solve([], _I, Count) ->
    Count;
solve([H | T], I, Count) ->
    NewCount = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) ->
            A = H,
            B = X,
            MinAB = min(abs(A - B), abs(A + B)),
            MaxAB = max(abs(A - B), abs(A + B)),
            MinAbs = min(abs(A), abs(B)),
            MaxAbs = max(abs(A), abs(B)),
            case (MinAB =< MinAbs) andalso (MaxAB >= MaxAbs) of
                true -> Acc + 1;
                false -> Acc
            end
        end,
        Count,
        T
    ),
    solve(T, I + 1, NewCount).
```

__data__.output:
```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    Len = length(Nums),
    Pairs = [{I, J} || I <- lists:seq(0, Len - 2), J <- lists:seq(I + 1, Len - 1)],
    lists:foldl(
        fun({I, J}, Acc) ->
            A = lists:nth(I + 1, Nums),
            B = lists:nth(J + 1, Nums),
            AbsA = abs(A),
            AbsB = abs(B),
            MinAB = min(AbsA, AbsB),
            MaxAB = max(AbsA, AbsB),
            Diff = abs(A - B),
            Sum = abs(A + B),
            MinDiffSum = min(Diff, Sum),
            MaxDiffSum = max(Diff, Sum),
            case (MinDiffSum =< MinAB) andalso (MaxDiffSum >= MaxAB) of
                true -> Acc + 1;
                false -> Acc
            end
        end,
        0,
        Pairs
    ).
```

solve(Nums) ->
    solve(Nums, 0, 0).

solve([], _I, Count) ->
    Count;
solve([A | Rest], I, Count) ->
    NewCount = lists:foldl(
        fun(B, Acc) ->
            case is_perfect_pair(A, B) of
                true -> Acc + 1;
                false -> Acc
            end
        end,
        Count,
        Rest
    ),
    solve(Rest, I + 1, NewCount).

is_perfect_pair(A, B) ->
    AbsA = abs(A),
    AbsB = abs(B),
    MinAB = min(AbsA, AbsB),
    MaxAB = max(AbsA, AbsB),
    Diff = abs(A - B),
    Sum = abs(A + B),
    MinDiffSum = min(Diff, Sum),
    MaxDiffSum = max(Diff, Sum),
    (MinDiffSum =< MinAB) and (MaxDiffSum >= MaxAB).
```

solve(Nums) ->
    solve(Nums, 0, 0).

solve([], I, Count) when I >= length(Nums) - 1 ->
    Count;
solve(Nums, I, Count) when I < length(Nums) - 1 ->
    J = I + 1,
    NewCount = check_pairs(Nums, I, J, Count),
    solve(Nums, I + 1, NewCount);
solve(Nums, I, Count) ->
    solve(Nums, I + 1, Count).

check_pairs(Nums, I, J, Count) when J < length(Nums) ->
    A = lists:nth(I + 1, Nums),
    B = lists:nth(J + 1, Nums),
    AbsA = abs(A),
    AbsB = abs(B),
    MinAB = min(AbsA, AbsB),
    MaxAB = max(AbsA, AbsB),
    Diff = abs(A - B),
    Sum = abs(A + B),
    MinDiffSum = min(Diff, Sum),
    MaxDiffSum = max(Diff, Sum),
    if
        MinDiffSum =< MinAB andalso MaxDiffSum >= MaxAB ->
            check_pairs(Nums, I, J + 1, Count + 1);
        true ->
            check_pairs(Nums, I, J + 1, Count)
    end;
check_pairs(_, _, _, Count) ->
    Count.
```

    solve(T, I + 1, NewCount).

check_pairs(_A, [], _J, Count) ->
    Count;
check_pairs(A, [B | Rest], J, Count) ->
    AbsA = abs(A),
    AbsB = abs(B),
    MinAB = min(AbsA, AbsB),
    MaxAB = max(AbsA, AbsB),
    Diff = abs(A - B),
    Sum = abs(A + B),
    MinDiffSum = min(Diff, Sum),
    MaxDiffSum = max(Diff, Sum),
    case (MinDiffSum =< MinAB) andalso (MaxDiffSum >= MaxAB) of
        true -> check_pairs(A, Rest, J + 1, Count + 1);
        false -> check_pairs(A, Rest, J + 1, Count)
    end.
```

solve(Nums) ->
    Len = length(Nums),
    Count = lists:foldl(
        fun(I, Acc1) ->
            A = lists:nth(I, Nums),
            lists:foldl(
                fun(J, Acc2) ->
                    B = lists:nth(J, Nums),
                    MinAB = min(abs(A - B), abs(A + B)),
                    MaxAB = max(abs(A - B), abs(A + B)),
                    MinAorB = min(abs(A), abs(B)),
                    MaxAorB = max(abs(A), abs(B)),
                    case (MinAB =< MinAorB) andalso (MaxAB >= MaxAorB) of
                        true -> Acc2 + 1;
                        false -> Acc2
                    end
                end,
                Acc1,
                lists:seq(I + 1, Len)
            )
        end,
        0,
        lists:seq(1, Len - 1)
    ),
    Count.
```
